name: @elastic/cli
description: Interact with Elasticsearch, Elastic Serverless and Elastic Cloud APIs from the command line.

scripts.test: npm run build && npm run test:lint && npm run test:unit

scripts.test:functional:es: echo 'ES functional tests not yet implemented' && exit 0
